description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, dark metallic head and a light-colored wooden handle. The head is broad and angular, with a flat striking face on one side and a sharply pointed pick on the opposite end, making it suitable for both driving and prying tasks. The wooden handle is straight, cylindrical, and displays a natural wood grain pattern, providing a comfortable grip. The metal head appears matte and slightly textured, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, ideal for heavy-duty urban or construction work. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A sturdy hammer with a dark metal head and a straight, light wood handle, featuring a flat striking face and a pointed pick end. The design is utilitarian and well-suited for construction or demolition tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown with its wooden handle angled toward the viewer and the metal head's flat striking face and pointed pick both visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the broad, flat face of the hammer's head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is seen from above, emphasizing the curved shape of the head and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back curve of the metal head and the end of the wooden handle, with minimal detail on the striking surfaces.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with visible wood grain, smooth surface, no additional grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: pick hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a sharply pointed pick on the other, made of dark steel
